steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The left side ends with an independent clause (the exhibition's overview goal). The right side begins with an introductory participial phrase ('given the collection's breadth of more than 120 photos,') preceding an independent clause ('its efforts were largely successful').

steps.title: Apply the rule for joining independent clauses
steps.content: A comma plus a coordinating conjunction joins two independent clauses. Option A correctly provides both with '1950s, and,' properly connecting the clauses while the participial phrase introduces the second one. The other options violate this rule by omitting one or both required elements. That matches choice A — A is correct.
